article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent artists and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with notable figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
He has released a sample pack in collaboration with Barnation, which contains a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across his productions.
His approach is characterized by a focus on moombahton and dancehall rhythms, reflecting a distinct production style within the electronic music landscape.
Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
